---
title: "Contact"
---

# 📫 Contact

## Pramod Kumar

📧 **Email**  
pk.narain129@yahoo.com  

📱 **Phone**  
+1 (236) 339-7049  

🌍 **Location**  
Canada  

---

## 🌐 Professional Profiles

**LinkedIn**  
https://www.linkedin.com/in/pramod-kumar-03405744

**GitHub Portfolio**  
https://pknarain129.github.io/pk-portfolio/

---

## 💼 Professional Interests

- Enterprise Communication Infrastructure  
- Artificial Intelligence in Business  
- Digital Transformation  
- Voice Collaboration Technologies
